findings.summary: Data acquisition board with ESP32-S3, motion sensors, pyro channels, CAN, LoRa. Good voltage divider and feedback detection. Switching regulators missing output_rail; isolation components not linked.

correct.description: Voltage dividers correctly identified for pyro sense (100k/30k) and feedback dividers
TPS566242 feedback (135k/30k -> 3.3V) and TPS564247 feedback (155k/30k -> 3.7V) correct with accurate Vout
Switching regulator topology correctly identifies TPS566242 and TPS564247 with inductor references

incorrect.description: Switching regulators TPS566242 (U303) and TPS564247 (U105) report input_rail and fb_net but no output_rail -- LDOs do have output_rail

suggestions: Switching regulators should trace output rail from inductor/output cap connections
ISOW77xx and ISO16xx should be recognized as isolation components
